text:
Now let me verify whether `compress_summary` is referenced outside `summary_compression.rs`.

The results show `compress_summary` only appears in `summary_compression.rs` -- the definition at line 37, the internal call at line 92, and test uses at lines 236, 244, 269. No external references.

Here is the complete analysis:

---

## ZERO external references (only defined + used within own file, including tests in that file)

These public functions have **no callers outside their defining file** -- all references are the definition itself, internal calls within the same file, and tests within the same file:

1. **`validate_read_only`** (bash_validation.rs) -- called only internally by `validate_mode` in the same file, plus tests in that file
2. **`check_destructive`** (bash_validation.rs) -- called only by `validate_command` in the same file, plus tests
3. **`validate_mode`** (bash_validation.rs) -- called only by `validate_command` in the same file, plus tests
4. **`validate_sed`** (bash_validation.rs) -- called only by `validate_command` in the same file, plus tests
5. **`validate_paths`** (bash_validation.rs) -- called only by `validate_command` in the same file, plus tests
6. **`classify_command`** (bash_validation.rs) -- only tests in the same file
7. **`validate_command`** (bash_validation.rs) -- only tests in the same file. The `validate_command` hits in `plugins/src/lib.rs` are unrelated functions (`validate_command_entries`, `validate_command_entry`, `validate_command_path`).
8. **`read_file_in_workspace`** (file_ops.rs) -- only tests in the same file
9. **`write_file_in_workspace`** (file_ops.rs) -- definition only, zero callers anywhere
10. **`edit_file_in_workspace`** (file_ops.rs) -- definition only, zero callers anywhere
11. **`is_symlink_escape`** (file_ops.rs) -- only tests in the same file
12. **`compress_summary`** (summary_compression.rs) -- called internally at line 92 (by `compress_summary_text`), plus tests in the same file. No external callers.
13. **`should_enable`** (remote.rs) -- method on a struct, called only within `remote.rs` (by `state_for_port` at line 137, plus tests)
14. **`state_for_port`** (remote.rs) -- method on a struct, called only within `remote.rs` tests
15. **`subprocess_env`** (remote.rs) -- method on a struct, called only within `remote.rs` tests
16. **`fork_managed_session`** (session_control.rs) -- the `pub fn fork_managed_session` at line 275 just delegates to `fork_managed_session_for`. No external callers use `fork_managed_session` directly (the CLI uses its own fork logic with `fork_managed_session_for` via the `_for` variant).
17. **`is_session_reference_alias`** (session_control.rs) -- called only within session_control.rs (by `resolve_session_reference_for` at line 116, plus tests)
18. **`managed_sessions_dir_for`** (session_control.rs) -- called only within session_control.rs (internally by other functions and tests)
19. **`load_managed_session`** (session_control.rs) -- the `pub fn load_managed_session` at line 256 just delegates to `load_managed_session_for`. No external callers of the non-`_for` variant.

## Referenced in tests only (outside defining file but only in test files)

None found in this category -- the test references were all within the same defining file's `#[cfg(test)]` module.

## Genuine cross-module callers (NOT dead code)

These functions have real callers outside their defining file:

20. **`upstream_proxy_ws_url`** (remote.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 124
21. **`no_proxy_list`** (remote.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 124
22. **`inherited_upstream_proxy_env`** (remote.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 124
23. **`read_token`** (remote.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 124
24. **`code_challenge_s256`** (oauth.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 97
25. **`loopback_redirect_uri`** (oauth.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 98, called from `rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs` line 811
26. **`parse_oauth_callback_query`** (oauth.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 98
27. **`credentials_path`** (oauth.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 97
28. **`sessions_dir`** (session_control.rs) -- note: a separate `sessions_dir` function exists in `rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs` too; the runtime version's callers are internal
29. **`create_managed_session_handle`** (session_control.rs) -- called from `rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs` at lines 2086, 2582, 2749 (though CLI also has its own wrapper)
30. **`resolve_session_reference`** (session_control.rs) -- called from `rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs` at lines 935, 2621, 2718
31. **`list_managed_sessions`** (session_control.rs) -- called from `rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs` at lines 2158, 3062, 3081
32. **`latest_managed_session`** (session_control.rs) -- called from `rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs` at line 2953
33. **`detect_container_environment`** (sandbox.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 129, called internally in sandbox.rs line 163
34. **`resolve_sandbox_status_for_request`** (sandbox.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 130, called from `bash.rs` line 182
35. **`build_linux_sandbox_command`** (sandbox.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 129, called from `bash.rs` lines 195, 222
36. **`prepend_bullets`** (prompt.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 116
37. **`auto_compaction_threshold_from_env`** (conversation.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 60
38. **`format_compact_summary`** (compact.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 48
39. **`should_compact`** (compact.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 49
40. **`estimate_session_tokens`** (compact.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 48, called from `conversation.rs` line 523
41. **`get_compact_continuation_message`** (compact.rs) -- re-exported in `lib.rs` line 49

## Important caveat on re-exports

Many functions in the "genuine callers" group are re-exported via `lib.rs` but may not actually be *called* from outside the crate -- they are just made publicly available. Functions like `upstream_proxy_ws_url`, `no_proxy_list`, `inherited_upstream_proxy_env`, `read_token`, `code_challenge_s256`, `parse_oauth_callback_query`, `credentials_path`, `prepend_bullets`, and `detect_container_environment` are re-exported in `lib.rs` but I found no call sites outside `runtime/src/`. They might be consumed by the CLI binary through the re-export, but no grep hits showed actual usage in `rusty-claude-cli` or other crates (except for `loopback_redirect_uri`, `create_managed_session_handle`, `resolve_session_reference`, `list_managed_sessions`, `latest_managed_session`, `resolve_sandbox_status_for_request`, `build_linux_sandbox_command`, `estimate_session_tokens`, which do have concrete call sites in `rusty-claude-cli`).

## Summary: Functions with ZERO external references

The following 19 functions have **no references at all outside their defining file** (all usage is internal or in-file tests):

| # | Function | File |
|---|----------|------|
| 1 | `validate_read_only` | bash_validation.rs |
| 2 | `check_destructive` | bash_validation.rs |
| 3 | `validate_mode` | bash_validation.rs |
| 4 | `validate_sed` | bash_validation.rs |
| 5 | `validate_paths` | bash_validation.rs |
| 6 | `classify_command` | bash_validation.rs |
| 7 | `validate_command` | bash_validation.rs |
| 8 | `read_file_in_workspace` | file_ops.rs |
| 9 | `write_file_in_workspace` | file_ops.rs |
| 10 | `edit_file_in_workspace` | file_ops.rs |
| 11 | `is_symlink_escape` | file_ops.rs |
| 12 | `compress_summary` | summary_compression.rs |
| 13 | `should_enable` | remote.rs |
| 14 | `state_for_port` | remote.rs |
| 15 | `subprocess_env` | remote.rs |
| 16 | `fork_managed_session` | session_control.rs |
| 17 | `is_session_reference_alias` | session_control.rs |
| 18 | `managed_sessions_dir_for` | session_control.rs |
| 19 | `load_managed_session` | session_control.rs |
